title: Build submission detail page with answer history, result, and products
completion_summary: Built submission detail page with full answer history, result display, recommended products, and responsive sidebar layout
acceptance_criteria: Server component fetches single Submission by ID with related Quiz name and Result data
Displays submission metadata section: date, quiz name, email, phone, name, session ID, IP, user agent
Displays answer history: each question title with selected answer(s) rendered as formatted list
Displays result section: result title, description, outcome type, outcome data (parsed from JSON)
Displays recommended products section: product title, image, price from stored JSON
Back link navigates to /submissions with preserved filter state
404 page rendered when submission ID is not found or belongs to different store
404 page rendered when submission ID does not exist
Responsive layout: metadata sidebar on desktop, stacked on mobile
